66cd4c3ac5459312fdcc521f.leadin: Many plays like The Eunuchs by a playwright who wrote in this language were translations of Greek works by Menander. For 10 points each:
66cd4c3ac5459312fdcc521f.leadin_sanitized: Many plays like The Eunuchs by a playwright who wrote in this language were translations of Greek works by Menander. For 10 points each:
parts: Name this ancient language, used by Terence to write The Self-Tormentor. This language used in the poetry of the Romans Martial and Juvenal was also used to write the Satyricon.
A section of the Satyricon focuses on an extravagant feast hosted by this freedman. The Great Gatsby was nearly named after this character, whom Gatsby is compared to at one point in the novel.
The Satyricon was written by this author.
